response.overview: Spanning 10 parts often watched together in a single runtime, this documentary about the origins of World War II is told from the perspective of the losing side and how the second world war was never a one sided conflict. The documentary peels back layers of propaganda and attempts to deliver an authentic reason for the start of World War II. Often dismissed as propaganda by those who forget history is written by victors it provides insight into a complicated web of lies and deceit.
response.title: Europa: The Last Battle
